markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and discuss CMS/dev support.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The strategy moves from traffic to leads, focusing on high-intent, commercial content to fill bottom-of-funnel gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Content Clusters:** Initial focus is on high-priority clusters (Business Banking, Credit Cards, Expense Management) and experimental ones (Startup Finance, Industry-Specific).](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**CMS Modernization:** GrowthX will scope a plan to help modernize Brex's "clunky" Sanity CMS, addressing a key bottleneck for the organic growth team.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Rapid Calibration:** An article refresh is ready for live review tomorrow, accelerating the feedback loop to align on quality and establish writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: Leads Over Traffic

  - [**Goal:** Support Jon Kowieski (Organic Growth Lead) by expanding the content library, freeing him for off-page SEO and experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Evaluation Metric:** Leads, not traffic. This drives a focus on commercial, high-intent keywords over top-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**High-Priority Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
          - [Business Banking & Treasury → **Focus on DDA (operating accounts)**, a strategic shift from the historical yield-forward treasury focus.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
          - [Credit Cards & Credit Management](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
          - [Expense Management & Receipt Tracking (to build authority)](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Experimental Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
          - [Startup Finance & Funding](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
          - [Industry-Specific Finance → Initial verticals: construction, medical/dental, multi-location retail.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
              - [**Note:** Brex will share its 8 target verticals for FY27 to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**De-prioritized:** Vendor management, corporate travel, and procurement due to existing partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Content OS & Ideation

  - [**Platform:** Airtable, serving as the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Current Status:** \~40 ideas generated from a competitor keyword gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Goal:** Reach 80–90 ideas for a comprehensive calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Jon requested secondary keywords be added to each idea record.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### CMS & Dev Support

  - [**Problem:** Brex's Sanity CMS is "clunky" and "no longer best practice," creating a bottleneck for the organic growth team.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** GrowthX can provide dev support, starting with custom blocks and CTAs to increase lead conversion on high-value pages (e.g., "best credit card" pages).](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** GrowthX will scope a plan to help modernize the CMS, potentially partnering with Brex's external agency, Loof.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Segment Marketing Sync Debrief

  - [**Key Learnings:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
      - [**Information Organization:** The segment marketing team has extensive documentation but struggles with organization; GrowthX will synthesize it.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
      - [**Execution Gap:** The team has strong content ideas (e.g., how-to guides) but lacks the resources for execution.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
      - [**Value Prop Clarity:** The team directed GrowthX to existing documentation for value prop details, indicating a potential internal communication challenge.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [Add secondary keywords to the Content OS (Airtable).](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [Scope a plan for Sanity CMS modernization.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Synthesize segment marketing materials and share key learnings.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
      - [Provide Alex Rudyak access to the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**Jon Kowieski:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [Create a "wish list" of dev/design projects for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [Share the business banking questionnaire with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [**Brex:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Share the 8 target verticals for FY27.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to the Sanity CMS and repo.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [Attend the live article calibration session tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/bGC8p8ZjDpvvKz8XgxuXYs51GsxL4phs?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
